description: Capability set granted to the main window. Slice T2 shipped the core baseline. Slice T4 added dialog:allow-open + fs:allow-read-text-file for native file open. Slice T5 added dialog:allow-save + fs:allow-write-text-file for native file save. Slice T6 added path:default + fs:allow-mkdir / fs:allow-remove / fs:allow-read-dir so the filesystem autosave can manage <appDataDir>/autosaves/. Slice T7 added event:allow-listen so the TS-side menu bridge can subscribe to the Rust menu emit (the menu itself doesn't need a per-window capability — the native menu is granted at app boot via tauri::Builder::set_menu).
